tool_input.summary: No precomputed “radial force balance of the dawnside magnetodisk (20–80 RJ)” product appears in the local PDS catalog. To answer the science question you’ll need in-situ magnetic field + plasma moments (for pressure/centrifugal terms) and trajectory/geometry (to select dawn local time and 20–80 RJ). Best coverage is from Galileo (multi-year, many passes through 20–80 RJ); Voyager and Pioneer provide flyby constraints; Juno entries in this catalog include plasma moments/electron density and SPICE kernels but (in this catalog snapshot) not Juno MAG vectors.

candidates.title: Galileo Orbiter at Jupiter Magnetometer High Resolution Calibrated Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Vector magnetic field measurements (calibrated) needed for magnetic pressure/tension terms in a radial force-balance test across the Jovian magnetodisk.

candidates.title: GO J MAG 3 RDR HIGHRES V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 predecessor of the Galileo high-resolution MAG calibrated bundle; useful if your pipeline expects PDS3 volumes.

candidates.title: GO J MAG 3 RDR MAGSPHERIC SURVEY V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Lower-rate Galileo MAG survey dataset (PDS3) that can support statistical force-balance studies and context intervals.

candidates.title: Galileo Plasma Science Experiment Jupiter Calibrated Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Provides plasma distributions/averaged products from Galileo PLS needed to estimate density/temperature/flow (centrifugal and pressure-gradient terms) in 20–80 RJ.

candidates.title: GO J PLS 5 RTS MOMENTS V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 plasma moments product (RTS moments) for Galileo PLS—directly useful for force-balance terms without re-deriving moments from full distributions.

candidates.title: Galileo Trajectory Jupiter Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Spacecraft trajectory in common Jovian coordinate systems (System III, JSE, JSM). Use this to select dawnside local time and radial distances 20–80 RJ and to compute geometry-dependent quantities.

candidates.title: GO J POS 6 SC TRAJ JUP COORDS V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 Galileo spacecraft trajectory at Jupiter; alternative to the PDS4 Galileo trajectory bundle for selecting dawnside intervals and R ranges.

candidates.title: Voyager 1 Magnetometer Jupiter Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Jupiter flyby magnetic field vectors useful for comparative/constraint checks on magnetodisk force balance near encounter distances (subset may overlap 20–80 RJ depending on geometry).

candidates.title: VG1 J MAG 4 SUMM S3COORDS 1.92SEC V1.1
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 Voyager 1 MAG summary in System III coordinates (high cadence) referenced by the PDS4 Voyager 1 MAG Jupiter bundle; useful if you want the original PDS3 volume form.

candidates.title: Voyager 2 Magnetometer Jupiter Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Second Jupiter flyby magnetic field vectors for comparison/constraints on force-balance conditions and dawn/dusk asymmetries.

candidates.title: Voyager 1 Plasma Science Experiment (PLS) Jupiter Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Voyager 1 plasma moments/distributions to estimate plasma pressure and bulk flow terms needed alongside MAG for force balance.

candidates.title: VG1 J PLS 5 SUMM ION MOM 96.0SEC V1.1
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 Voyager 1 PLS ion moments (summary) referenced by the PDS4 Voyager 1 PLS Jupiter bundle; convenient for force-balance calculations.

candidates.title: Voyager 2 Plasma Science Experiment (PLS) Jupiter Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Voyager 2 plasma products to pair with Voyager 2 MAG for a self-consistent force-balance check along the flyby trajectory.

candidates.title: VG2 J PLS 5 SUMM ION MOM 96.0SEC V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 Voyager 2 PLS ion moments (summary) that can be used for pressure/centrifugal terms; referenced by later PDS4 bundle products.

candidates.title: JNO J JAD 5 MOMENTS V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Juno JADE plasma moments (PDS3) can provide particle moments to support magnetodisk force-balance studies; would need to combine with separate Juno magnetic field data (not found in this catalog snapshot).

candidates.title: Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies
candidates.reasoning: Electron density estimates from Juno Waves can supplement plasma pressure/mass-loading estimates when combined with trajectory and magnetic field data.

candidates.title: JUNO SPICE FILES
candidates.reasoning: SPICE kernels needed to compute local time (dawnside selection) and radial distance along Juno’s trajectory for correlating with plasma/magnetic measurements.

candidates.title: Pioneer 11 Calibrated Helium Vector Magnetometer at Jupiter Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Additional in-situ Jovian magnetic field constraints at large radial distances (flyby era), potentially overlapping 20–80 RJ depending on trajectory; useful for historical comparison.

parts.content:
You are a dataset-discovery assistant for the NASA PDS catalog (atm, geo, img, naif, ppi, rms, sbn nodes, ~12k datasets).

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
Is Jupiter's dawnside magnetodisk approximately in radial force balance between 20 and 80 R_J?

dataset.title: Galileo Orbiter at Jupiter Magnetometer High Resolution Calibrated Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains magnetic field vectors acquired by the Galileo magnetometer (MAG). This data was previously released as PDS3 data in the GO-J-MAG-3-RDR-HIGHRES-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519667) and GO-J-MAG-3-RDR-MAGSPHERIC-SURVEY-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519668) data sets.

dataset.title: Galileo Plasma Science Experiment Jupiter Calibrated Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains averaged raw data and spin averaged count rates from selected ion and electron channels from the Plasma Science experiment (PLS) onboard the Galileo spacecraft for all Jupiter orbits. These data have been averaged and reformatted into ASCII tables to facilitate data display and analysis.

dataset.title: Galileo Trajectory Jupiter Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains Galileo spacecraft trajectory data in three coordinate systems commonly used in the analysis of Jovian magnetospheric data. These include System III (1965.0), Jupiter Solar Equatorial (JSE) and Jupiter Solar Magnetospheric (JSM) coordinates from the Jupiter Orbital Operations phases of the Galileo Mission.

dataset.title: Voyager 1 Magnetometer Jupiter Data Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains Voyager 1 Magnetometer Jupiter data in resampled Heliographic (RTN) and System III coordinates at 1.92, 9.60 and 48.0 second sample rates. This data was previously released as the following PDS3 data sets: VG1-J-MAG-4-SUMM-HGCOORDS-1.92SEC-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519884) VG1-J-MAG-4-SUMM-HGCOORDS-9.60SEC-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519886) VG1-J-MAG-4-SUMM-HGCOORDS-48.0SEC-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519885) VG1-J-MAG-4-SUMM-S3COORDS-1.92SEC-V1.1 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519887) VG1-J-MAG-4-SUMM-S3COORDS-9.60SEC-V1.1 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519889) VG1-J-MAG-4-SUMM-S3COORDS-48.0SEC-V1.1 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519888).

dataset.title: Voyager 1 Plasma Science Experiment (PLS) Jupiter Data Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains Voyager 1 Plasma Science Experiment (PLS) data recorded during the Jupiter encounter. These data were previously released as the following PDS3 data sets: VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ELE-MOM-96.0SEC-V1.1 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519890), VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ION-INBNDSWIND-96S-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519891), VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ION-L-MODE-96S-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519892), VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ION-M-MODE-96S-V1.0 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519893) and VG1-J-PLS-5-SUMM-ION-MOM-96.0SEC-V1.1 (https://doi.org/10.17189/1519894).

dataset.title: Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies
dataset.description: This bundle contains electron density datasets from Waves team members throughout the Juno Mission. Measurements include, but are not limited to, Fpe, Flhr, Fuh, Fce.
